summary: Israel anticipates negotiation collapse, preparing for renewed war as Netanyahu claims nuclear success. US-Iran talks proceed amid Iranian demands to retain military achievements and US insistence on Gulf navigation rights.

top_updates.headline: US-Iran talks commence in Pakistani capital; warships transit Hormuz.
Israel anticipates negotiation collapse, prepares for war renewal.
Hezbollah barrages Northern Israel with rockets and drones.

detailed_analysis: US-Iran talks have shifted location to Pakistan, though disagreements persist over navigation rights and Iranian military achievements. Hezbollah maintains ongoing rocket and drone barrages against northern Israel. Israel states its campaign in Iran is "not over yet" and prepares for renewed conflict, with Netanyahu claiming an existential nuclear threat was averted. The election of an Iran-friendly Iraqi President strengthens Tehran's regional influence. Watch for escalation triggers in negotiations or proxy actions.
